name: pr_cep_tjoverflow
drl: rule R when $a : A() $b : B(this after[0ms,10ms] $a) then end
_finding: Temporal-join delta i64/long OVERFLOW: after[0,10] computes d = B.ts - A.ts in wrapping two's-complement on BOTH sides (engine eval_allen wrapping_sub = Java AfterEvaluator plain long subtraction), so the extreme pairings (ctlA x maxB, minA x ctlB, minA x maxB) all land OUT of [0,10] identically and only the in-range control pair fires; the extreme events' expiration deadlines also wrap negative => kept forever (DROOLS-455 = engine D-133 branch). Pins wrap-faithfulness of the Allen delta (adversarial-surface pass on v0.4.4, companion to pr_cep_expoverflow).
